case_title: BLOOMFIELD, JOHN F. VS ROMSBURG, DAN ALBERT et al

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BLOOMFIELD, JOHN F. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROMSBURG, DAN ALBERT $1,060.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,100.00, DISMISSED AS TO DEFT SCHUSTER, MELBA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
